raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output rephrases the original text with improved clarity and coherence, maintaining the core concepts.",
    "R1.2": "The output walks through the argument chain end-to-end, identifying inconsistencies (e.g., PPO generating net revenue) and proposing fixes.",
    "R1.3": "Every claim is checked against the revised text; evidence supports all claims.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is polished with consistent register and no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "Confidence levels are clearly marked for each recommendation, including uncertainty where appropriate.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set without drift.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content were introduced; minor clarifications were made to avoid confusion.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The output rephrases the original text with improved clarity and coherence, maintaining the core concepts.
rationale.R1.2: The output walks through the argument chain end-to-end, identifying inconsistencies (e.g., PPO generating net revenue) and proposing fixes.
rationale.R1.3: Every claim is checked against the revised text; evidence supports all claims.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is polished with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Confidence levels are clearly marked for each recommendation, including uncertainty where appropriate.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced; minor clarifications were made to avoid confusion.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance.
